all<-geojson_read("ski_tours/all_ski_tours.geojson", what="sp") %>% st_as_sf()
#load new tour geojson tracks
flagpole<-geojson_read("ski_tours/flagpole.geojson", what="sp") %>% st_as_sf() %>%
 mutate(name= "flagpole peak", id=51)
new <- rbind(flagpole) %>%
  select(id, name)
#combine the new tracks with the all the other
all <- rbind(all, new)
st_write(all, dsn="ski_tours/all_ski_tours.geojson", driver="GeoJSON", delete_dsn = T)
